findings.summary: Kymera Therapeutics announced its participation in two upcoming investor conferences: the Bank of America 2026 Healthcare Conference on May 12 and the RBC Capital Markets 2026 Global Healthcare Conference on May 19.

findings.summary: InflaRx announced the pricing of an underwritten offering of 75,000,000 ordinary shares at a price of $2.00 per share, aiming to raise $150 million to advance its pipeline activities and for general corporate purposes.

findings.competitors_citation: Article body mentions Oruka Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORKA)
findings.keywords_citation: No keywords from the monitoring list were found in the article text (mentions IL-23p19 and psoriasis, which are not on the list).
findings.summary: Oruka Therapeutics and Halozyme announced a global exclusive collaboration and license agreement. Oruka licensed Halozyme’s Hypercon™ microparticle technology for use with ORKA-001, an antibody in development for psoriasis and related inflammatory diseases.
